step_rationale: Lipid biomarker of lipid-rich noncalcified plaque; hallmark of rupture-prone atherosclerotic lesions.
mechanism: Lysophosphatidylethanolamine 18:0 is enriched in lipid-rich noncalcified plaque, marking high-risk atherogenic lesions susceptible to rupture.

references.title: Variability of the Plasma Lipidome and Subclinical Coronary Atherosclerosis.
